infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Everyone 72 uses your camera to capture practice session photos to share with friends.

infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Everyone 72 saves photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Everyone 72 uses your location to help find nearby golf courses.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Everyone 72 uses your location to help find nearby golf courses.
